name: golang-gocloud-dev
title: golang-gocloud-dev
summary: Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK) for open cloud development in Go
description:
Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK) for open cloud development in Go
The Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK) Write once, run on any cloud ☁️
.
The Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK) allows Go application developers to
seamlessly deploy cloud applications on any combination of cloud providers. It
does this by providing stable, idiomatic interfaces for common uses like
storage and databases. Think database/sql for cloud products.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-gocloud-dev because Go Cloud Development Kit (Go CDK) for open cloud development in Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-gocloud-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-gocloud-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-gocloud-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
